description: NinjaTrader 8 is open on the Windows desktop with real daily OHLCV data for SPY (Jan 2023–Dec 2024). A swing trader needs to filter noise from the RSI indicator. Create a new chart for 'SPY' with 'Daily' bars. Add an 'RSI' indicator (Period 14) and an 'SMA' indicator (Period 10) to the chart. Configure the SMA to use the RSI as its input series to smooth the values, ensuring both indicators appear in the same sub-panel below the price chart. Save the workspace to persist these changes.
